common.pageNotFoundDescription: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
common.name: Name
common.confirmDuplicateDescription: A copy of this template will be created. Continue?
common.loadError: Failed to load data. Please try again.

roaming.subtitle: Configure OCPI roaming partners, location publishing, sessions, CDRs, and tariff mappings.

partners.title: Roaming Partners
partners.subtitle: Manage OCPI partner connections for roaming charge sessions across networks.
partners.partnerRegistrationTokenHint: Required only when you will initiate registration with the partner (outbound). The partner shares this OCPI Token C with you out-of-band. Leave blank if the partner will register inbound using the token shown after creation.
partners.tokenCreated: Registration token created. Share this token with the partner so they can register with your OCPI server.
partners.tokenWarning: This token will only be shown once. Copy it now.
partners.disconnectDescription: This will deactivate all tokens and mark the partner as disconnected. Roaming sessions with this partner will stop working.
partners.noEndpoints: No endpoints configured. Register the partner to discover endpoints.

locations.title: Location Publishing
locations.subtitle: Control which sites are published to roaming partners via OCPI.
locations.description: Control which sites are published to roaming partners via OCPI.

sessions.title: Roaming Sessions
sessions.subtitle: Charging sessions driven by external partner tokens via the OCPI network.

cdrs.title: Charge Detail Records
cdrs.subtitle: Roaming CDRs exchanged with OCPI partners for cross-network billing.

tariffs.title: Tariff Mappings
tariffs.subtitle: Map your internal tariffs to OCPI-format tariffs visible to roaming partners.
tariffs.confirmDeleteMapping: This tariff mapping will be permanently deleted.

auth.title: EVtivity CSMS
auth.subtitle: Sign in to your account
auth.recaptchaFailed: Security verification failed. Please try again.
auth.ssoNoEmail: SSO login failed: no email address in the identity provider response.
auth.ssoAccountDisabled: Your account has been disabled. Contact your administrator.
auth.ssoUserNotFound: No account found for your SSO identity. Contact your administrator.
auth.ssoConfigError: SSO configuration error. Contact your administrator.
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link
auth.resetLinkSent: If an account exists with that email, a reset link has been sent.
auth.passwordResetSuccess: Password reset. You can now sign in with your new password.
auth.invalidResetLink: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth.mfaResendFailed: Failed to resend code. Try again.
auth.mfaInvalidCode: Invalid or expired code. Try again.
auth.mustSetPassword: Your account requires a password change before you can continue.
auth.contactAdminForInvite: Contact your administrator to send a new invitation.
auth.setPasswordSubtitle: Your account requires a password change before you can continue.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noSnapshotData: No snapshot data for this date

info.totalStations: Total number of charging stations registered in the system.
info.online: Percentage of stations currently connected and communicating via OCPP.
info.onlineCount: Number of stations currently connected and communicating via OCPP.
info.uptime: Average connector uptime across all stations over the last 30 days.
info.activeSessions: Number of charging sessions currently in progress.
info.energyDelivered: Total energy delivered across all stations since the system started.
info.totalSessions: Total number of completed and active charging sessions.
info.ocppConnections: Number of stations with active WebSocket connections to the OCPP server.
info.pingLatency: Average WebSocket ping round-trip time across all connected stations.
info.pingSuccessRate: Percentage of WebSocket pings that received a timely response.
info.totalRevenue: Total revenue from all completed charging sessions.
info.todayRevenue: Revenue from charging sessions completed today.
info.revenuePerSession: Average revenue per completed charging session.
info.totalTransactions: Total number of payment transactions processed.
info.faults: Number of stations currently reporting a fault condition.
info.stationStatus: Distribution of station statuses across all registered stations.
info.utilization: Percentage of time each site's connectors were occupied during the selected period. A site at 100% would mean every station was charging nonstop for the entire period.
info.energyChart: Daily energy delivered across all stations for the selected period.
info.sessionsChart: Daily charging session count for the selected period.
info.revenueChart: Daily revenue from charging sessions for the selected period.
info.paymentBreakdown: Distribution of payment transaction statuses (captured, pending, refunded, etc.).
info.peakUsage: Heatmap of charging session start times by hour and day of week.
info.activeSessionsTable: Real-time view of currently active charging sessions.
info.siteMap: Map showing all site locations with station counts.
info.electricityCost: Operator's total wholesale electricity cost across all sessions, from configured per-site rates.
info.dayElectricityCost: Wholesale electricity cost from sessions completed today.
info.profit: Total revenue minus total electricity cost across all sessions.
info.dayProfit: Today's revenue minus today's electricity cost.
info.totalPorts: Total number of connector ports across all stations.

historicalInfo.totalStations: Registered stations for {{date}}. Range selections show the daily average.
historicalInfo.online: Online percentage for {{date}}. Range selections show the daily average.
historicalInfo.onlineCount: Online stations for {{date}}. Range selections show the daily average.
historicalInfo.uptime: Connector uptime for {{date}}. Range selections show the daily average.
historicalInfo.activeSessions: Active sessions for {{date}}. Range selections show the daily average.
historicalInfo.dayEnergy: Energy delivered for {{date}}. Range selections show the daily average.
historicalInfo.daySessions: Sessions started for {{date}}. Range selections show the daily average.
historicalInfo.dayRevenue: Revenue earned for {{date}}. Range selections show the daily average.
historicalInfo.dayTransactions: Transactions processed for {{date}}. Range selections show the daily average.
historicalInfo.totalRevenue: Cumulative revenue for {{date}}. Range selections show the daily average.
historicalInfo.revenuePerSession: Revenue per session for {{date}}. Range selections show the daily average.
historicalInfo.totalSessions: Cumulative sessions for {{date}}. Range selections show the daily average.
historicalInfo.totalTransactions: Cumulative transactions for {{date}}. Range selections show the daily average.

trendInfo.totalStations: Average station count over the last 14 days ({{from}} to {{to}}).
trendInfo.online: Average online percentage over the last 14 days ({{from}} to {{to}}).
trendInfo.onlineCount: Average online station count over the last 14 days ({{from}} to {{to}}).
trendInfo.uptime: Average uptime over the last 14 days ({{from}} to {{to}}).
trendInfo.activeSessions: Average active session count over the last 14 days ({{from}} to {{to}}).
trendInfo.daySessions: Average daily sessions over the last 14 days ({{from}} to {{to}}).
trendInfo.dayRevenue: Average daily revenue over the last 14 days ({{from}} to {{to}}).
trendInfo.dayEnergy: Average daily energy over the last 14 days ({{from}} to {{to}}).
trendInfo.revenuePerSession: Average revenue per session over the last 14 days ({{from}} to {{to}}).
trendInfo.totalSessions: Average cumulative session count over the last 14 days ({{from}} to {{to}}).

dashboard.co2AvoidedTooltip: Total CO₂ emissions avoided by EV charging vs gasoline driving

sites.title: Sites
sites.subtitle: Manage your charging locations. Filter by city, state, or load management to find a site.
sites.searchHint: Search by site ID, name, city, or state
sites.contactPublicNote: When public, contact info is visible to drivers on the Portal.
sites.qrCodesDescription: QR codes for all stations at this site. Print and place on each charger for guest checkout.
sites.updateExistingDescription: When enabled, existing records will be updated with new data instead of skipped.
sites.pricingDescription: Pricing assigned here applies to all stations in this site. Overridden by station-level or driver/fleet pricing.
sites.reservationsEnabledHelp: Allow reservations at stations in this site
sites.freeVendDescription: When enabled, stations at this site allow charging without driver identification or payment. OCPP autostart configuration is pushed to all stations.
sites.confirmEnableFreeVend: This will allow all stations at this site to charge without driver identification or payment. OCPP autostart configuration will be pushed to all online stations.
sites.confirmDisableFreeVend: This will require driver identification and payment for charging at this site. Station OCPP configuration will not be changed.
sites.freeVendDisabledNote: Free Vend is disabled. Sessions now require driver identification and payment. Station OCPP configuration was not changed. To restore authorization requirements on stations, edit the config template and re-push.
sites.freeVendOcpp16Note: OCPP 1.6 does not define a standard free vend mechanism. These default keys work with most stations but some manufacturers use vendor-specific keys (e.g., FreeCharging, FreeVendEnabled). If the push results show rejected variables, edit the template to add your station's vendor-specific key and re-push.
sites.carbonRegionDescription: Select the grid region for carbon intensity calculations.
sites.noElectricityRatesDescription: Add a rate to track wholesale electricity cost per session.

stations.title: Stations
stations.subtitle: Browse and manage stations across all your sites. Filter by site, vendor, status, or protocol.
stations.searchHint: Search by station ID, model, or internal ID
stations.evseStatusTooltip: Derived from connector statuses: Charging if any occupied, Reserved if any reserved, Faulted if any faulted, Available if all available
stations.connectorsTooltip: DC connectors (CCS, CHAdeMO, NACS) shown with lightning icon. AC connectors (Type1, Type2) shown with plug icon.
stations.qrCodesDescription: Print these QR codes and place them on the charger. Drivers scan to start a guest checkout session.
stations.qrCodesHardwareNote: Some chargers can display the QR code on the hardware. To configure them, open the <configTab>Configurations</configTab> tab to pull the current values from the station, identify which variables hold the QR or connector URLs, then create a template under <templates>Settings → Station Configurations</templates> to push the new values.
stations.security16Info: Security profile and password changes must be configured on the station directly. The CSMS stores the password for connection authentication only.
stations.sp1Desc: Username and password via HTTP Basic Auth
stations.sp2Desc: TLS encryption with HTTP Basic Auth
stations.sp3Desc: Mutual TLS with client certificate. No password required.
stations.sp3CertNote: Requires client certificate. Configure via Certificates tab.
stations.sp16_2Desc: TLS encryption with HTTP Basic Authentication
stations.passwordRequiredForProfile: A password is required to enable this security profile.
stations.rotateCredentialsConfirm: This will generate a new password for {{stationId}} and push it to the station via OCPP SetVariables. The old password will stop working immediately.
stations.changePasswordConfirm: This will update the password for {{stationId}} and push it to the station via OCPP SetVariables. The old password will stop working immediately.
stations.profileChangeOcppOnline: This will send a SetVariables command to {{stationId}} to update its security profile, then reset the station to reconnect with the new profile.
stations.profileChangeOcppOffline: The station is offline. The profile will be saved and enforced on next connection.
stations.rotateHelpText: Generates a new random password, pushes it to the station via OCPP, and updates the server.
stations.changePasswordOcppOnline: This will update the password on the server and push it to {{stationId}} via OCPP SetVariables, then reset the station to reconnect.
stations.changePasswordOcppOffline: The station is offline. The password will be saved on the server and used to authenticate the station on next connection.
stations.confirmClearMessage: Clear this message from the station display?
stations.confirmStopActiveSession: Force-stop the active session on EVSE {{evseId}}? This sends RequestStopTransaction to the station.
stations.noActiveSession: No active session on this EVSE
stations.stationOfflineCannotSim: Station offline - cannot send simulator action
stations.confirmDeleteEvse: This will remove EVSE {{id}} and all its connectors. This action cannot be undone.
stations.confirmDeleteConnector: This will remove Connector {{id}}. This action cannot be undone.
stations.cannotDeleteOccupied: Cannot delete while charging is in progress.
stations.duplicateEvseId: This EVSE ID already exists on this station.
stations.duplicateConnectorId: This Connector ID already exists on this EVSE.
stations.pricingDescription: Pricing assigned here applies to all drivers charging at this station. Overrides site-level pricing. Overridden by driver or fleet pricing.
stations.ocppUrlHelp: Configure this URL in your charging station's network settings as the OCPP Backend URL or Central System URL. The station ID in the URL must match the Station ID registered here. For TLS (Security Profile 3), use port 8443 with wss:// instead.
stations.localAuthListDescription: Manage locally cached driver tokens on this station
stations.noLocalAuthEntries: No tokens in local auth list
stations.confirmPushToStation: This will push all tracked entries to the station local auth list. Continue?
stations.pushVersionZeroWarning: This is the first push. It will replace any existing local list on the station.
stations.confirmRemoveEntry: Remove this token from the station local auth list?
stations.unpushedChanges: You have unpushed changes. Push to sync with the station.
stations.noImagesDescription: Upload images of this station for identification and documentation.
stations.caption: Caption
stations.confirmDeleteImage: Are you sure you want to delete this image? This cannot be undone.
stations.confirmDriverVisibleOn: Make this image visible to drivers on the portal location page?
stations.confirmDriverVisibleOff: Hide this image from drivers on the portal location page?
stations.isSimulatorHelp: Simulator stations are loaded by the charging station simulator for testing.
stations.pendingApproval: This station is pending approval. Approve to allow it to accept charging sessions, or reject to block it.
stations.blockedInfo: This station is blocked. Approve to allow it to accept charging sessions.
stations.blockStationDescription: This will block the station from connecting. The station will not be permanently deleted. You can unblock it later to restore it to pending status.
stations.securityEventsDescription: Security-related events reported by the station via OCPP SecurityEventNotification, such as authentication failures, tamper detection, and firmware changes.
stations.meterValuesDescription: Standalone meter readings reported outside of charging sessions. These include clock-aligned interval readings and EVSE-level telemetry sent via the MeterValues message.
stations.notifyEventsDescription: Variable monitoring events reported by the station via OCPP NotifyEvent, such as threshold breaches, periodic readings, and delta changes.
stations.noScheduleAnchor: Station did not return a schedule anchor; showing offsets only.
stations.confirmClearAllProfiles: This will remove all CSMS-set charging profiles from this station.
stations.confirmClearProfile: This will remove this charging profile from the station.
stations.confirmRebootStation: Reboot {{stationId}}? Active sessions will finish before the reboot.
stations.confirmDeleteRule: Are you sure you want to delete this monitoring rule?

eventAlertRules.title: Event Alert Rules
eventAlertRules.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this alert rule?

sessions.title: Sessions
sessions.subtitle: Recent and historical charging sessions across the fleet. Filter by station, driver, status, or date range.
sessions.reservationTokenMismatchDescription: This session was started with a different token than the one the reservation was bound to. The session was allowed to proceed; review for billing or fraud signals.
sessions.searchHint: Search by session ID, transaction ID, station ID, or driver name
sessions.reservationTokenMismatchTooltip: This session fulfilled a reservation, but the token used differs from the one the reservation was bound to.
sessions.meterValuesDescription: Meter readings reported during this transaction. OCPP 2.1 stations send these inside TransactionEvent messages. OCPP 1.6 stations send them via MeterValues and StopTransaction messages.
sessions.electricityCostTooltip: Operator's wholesale electricity cost for this session

drivers.title: Drivers
drivers.subtitle: Manage your driver accounts. Filter by status to find active or inactive drivers.
drivers.searchHint: Search by name, driver ID, email, or phone
drivers.pricingDescription: Pricing assigned here follows this driver to every station. Overrides station, site, and fleet pricing.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pricing groups bundle one or more tariffs that apply by site, station, fleet, or driver.
pricing.confirmDeleteTariffDesc: This tariff will be permanently deleted.
pricing.confirmDeleteGroupDesc: This pricing group and all its tariffs will be permanently deleted.
pricing.confirmRemoveGroupDesc: Are you sure you want to remove this pricing group assignment?
pricing.searchHint: Search by pricing group ID, name, or description
pricing.reservationFeeHelper: Charged for the time between reservation start and session start.
pricing.tariffInUse: This tariff is used by charging sessions and cannot be deleted
pricing.groupTariffsInUse: This group has tariffs used by charging sessions and cannot be deleted
pricing.overlapError: This tariff overlaps with an existing tariff in this group
pricing.holidaysSubtitle: Holiday dates apply to time-of-day tariffs that opt in via the 'holidays' restriction.
pricing.bulkAddPlaceholder: One holiday per line: YYYY-MM-DD Holiday Name
pricing.bulkHolidaySummary: Imported {{created}} holiday(s); {{skipped}} skipped because the date already exists.

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Operator accounts for the dashboard. Filter by role, status, or site access.
users.resetPasswordDescription: Set a new password for this user. The password takes effect immediately. The user will be forced to change the password on next login. Share the new password with the user through a secure channel.
users.searchHint: Search by user ID, email, first name, or last name
users.allSitesDescription: Access all sites, including future ones
users.siteAccessRequired: At least one site must be selected
users.permissionsDescription: Select the permissions this user should have. Write implies read.

profile.title: Profile
profile.notificationsDescription: Manage how you receive notifications from the system.
profile.mfaDisableConfirm: Enter your password to disable MFA
profile.mfaNotAvailable: No MFA methods are currently available. Contact your administrator.
profile.mfaScanQr: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app
profile.chatbotAiRemoveConfirm: Remove your personal chatbot AI configuration? The system default will be used instead.
profile.supportAiDescription: Personal support AI configuration. Overrides system defaults.
profile.supportAiRemoveConfirm: Remove your personal support AI configuration? The system default will be used instead.

fleets.title: Fleets
fleets.subtitle: Group drivers and stations into fleets for shared pricing and reporting.
fleets.searchHint: Search by fleet ID, name, or description
fleets.confirmRemoveDriver: Are you sure you want to remove this driver from the fleet?
fleets.confirmRemoveStation: Are you sure you want to delete this station from the fleet?
fleets.confirmRemoveVehicle: Are you sure you want to remove this vehicle from the fleet? This will remove the vehicle's owner driver from the fleet.
fleets.removeDriversFirst: Remove all drivers before deleting this fleet.
fleets.noStations: No stations assigned to this fleet
fleets.pricingDescription: Pricing assigned here applies to all drivers in this fleet at every station. Overrides station and site pricing. Overridden by individual driver pricing.
fleets.searchDriversPlaceholder: Search drivers by name or email...
fleets.searchStationsPlaceholder: Search stations by ID or model...
fleets.searchVehiclesPlaceholder: Search vehicles by make, model, or driver...
fleets.addVehicleNote: Adding a vehicle will also add its owner driver to the fleet.
fleets.addDriverNote: Adding a driver will also add their vehicles to the fleet.
fleets.chargingProfileHelp: Optional TxProfile to guarantee minimum power per station

tokens.title: Tokens
tokens.subtitle: RFID and charging tokens registered with the system. Filter by driver, token type, or status.
tokens.deleteConfirmDescription: This token will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
tokens.searchHint: Search by token ID, token value, or driver name
tokens.authorizeLogDescription: Every Authorize attempt the CSMS has seen, regardless of outcome.

commands.title: Commands
commands.confirmDescription: {{action}} on {{stationId}} affects station state and cannot be undone. Continue?
commands.clearCacheDescription: Clear the authorization cache on this station.
commands.customKeyHint: For custom or vendor-specific keys, go to the <configTab>Configurations</configTab> tab.

charts.ocpp16EvseNote: OCPP 1.6 has no EVSE concept on the wire — only connectors. We model each 1.6 connector as its own EVSE for a uniform schema; expect one connector per EVSE here.
charts.ocpp21EvseNote: OCPP 2.1 uses an EVSE-with-N-connectors hierarchy as a first-class protocol concept. One EVSE can expose multiple connectors (e.g., CCS + CHAdeMO).
charts.evseProtocolNote: OCPP 1.6 has no EVSE concept (connectors only); OCPP 2.1 treats EVSEs as first-class with N connectors each.
charts.popularTimesInfo: Average number of charging sessions by hour, based on the last {{weeks}} weeks of data.

payments.connectedAccountHelp: Leave empty to use the platform account directly
payments.stripeNotConfigured: Payment processing is not available. Configure Stripe in Settings before adding payment methods.
payments.confirmDeletePaymentMethod: Are you sure you want to delete the {{brand}} card ending in {{last4}}?

systemInfo.title: System Information
systemInfo.secretsNote: Secret values (passwords, tokens, encryption keys) are never exposed. "Configured" only indicates whether a value is set.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure system-wide preferences: branding, payments, integrations, security, API keys, and operator tools.
settings.qrCodeIconDescription: Upload an SVG icon to embed in the center of QR codes.
settings.ftpServerDescription: Configure the FTP server used for log uploads and firmware distribution.
settings.smtpDescription: Configure the SMTP server for sending email notifications.
settings.twilioDescription: Configure Twilio for sending SMS notifications.
settings.companyInfoDescription: Your organization name, contact details, and address.
settings.companyPortalUrlHint: URL shown as a link on the operator login page.
settings.faviconDescription: Displayed in the browser tab. Recommended size: 32x32 or 64x64 pixels.
settings.ogImageDescription: Displayed when sharing links on social media. Recommended size: 1200x630 pixels.
settings.themeColorDescription: Browser chrome color for mobile devices. Used on login and portal pages.
settings.emailLayoutDescription: Customize the wrapper layout applied to all outgoing emails. Use {{{content}}} for the email body.
settings.roamingDescription: When enabled, the system exchanges data with roaming partners via the OCPI protocol. Disabling hides the Roaming section and blocks all OCPI traffic.
settings.sustainabilityDescription: Configure parameters used for GHG emissions calculations in sustainability reports. Default values use EPA estimates for the US grid.
settings.gridEmissionFactorHint: Average CO₂ emissions per kWh from the electricity grid. US average: 0.386
settings.evEfficiencyHint: Average electric vehicle efficiency. Default: 3.3 miles/kWh
settings.gasolineEmissionFactorHint: CO₂ emissions per gallon of gasoline burned. EPA value: 8.887
settings.avgMpgHint: Average fuel economy of conventional vehicles. US average: 25.4 MPG
settings.s3Description: Configure S3-compatible object storage for file attachments on support cases.
settings.s3TestFailed: S3 connection failed. Check your credentials and bucket name.
settings.s3PolicyDescription: Your IAM user needs the following permissions on the S3 bucket. Replace YOUR_BUCKET_NAME with your actual bucket name.
settings.s3BucketPrivateNote: The S3 bucket should not be public. All file access is handled through presigned URLs generated by the server.
settings.s3CorsDescription: Your S3 bucket needs a CORS policy to allow direct file uploads from the browser. Add this under Bucket > Permissions > CORS. Replace YOUR_FRONTEND_ORIGIN with your dashboard URL (e.g. http://localhost:7100).
settings.pncDescription: When enabled, the system manages PKI certificates for ISO 15118 Plug and Charge. Disabling hides the Certificates section and blocks certificate operations.
settings.pncSaveFailed: Failed to save Plug & Charge settings.
settings.recaptchaDescription: reCAPTCHA v3 protects login pages from automated bots. Users are scored invisibly without solving puzzles.
settings.recaptchaSecretHint: Stored encrypted on the server. Leave blank to keep the current value.
settings.recaptchaThresholdHint: Requests scoring below this value are rejected. Range: 0.0 (allow all) to 1.0 (block most). Recommended: 0.5.
settings.mfaDescription: Multi-factor authentication adds a second verification step during login. Enable methods here to make them available system-wide. Individual users and drivers enable MFA for themselves via their profile.
settings.ssoDescription: Configure SAML 2.0 single sign-on with your identity provider.
settings.marketingDescription: Configure Google Analytics tracking for the Portal and CSMS frontends.
settings.gtagHint: Google Analytics measurement ID, e.g. G-XXXXXXXXXX
settings.reservationEnabledDesc: Allow drivers to reserve charging connectors in advance.
settings.reservationBufferMinutesHelp: Minutes before reservation starts where no new sessions are allowed
settings.reservationCancellationWindowMinutesHelp: Cancellations within this window incur a fee
settings.reservationCancellationFeeCentsHelp: Fee charged when cancelling within the cancellation window
settings.reservationMaxHoursHelp: Caps the length of any single reservation window. Default 3.
settings.supportEnabledDesc: Allow drivers to submit and view support cases.
settings.fleetEnabledDesc: Allow operators to create and manage fleet accounts.
settings.guestChargingEnabledDesc: Allow unauthenticated users to start charging sessions without an account.
settings.ocppStationConfigDescription: These values are sent to the station after each BootNotification. OCPP 2.1 stations receive SetVariables commands. OCPP 1.6 stations receive ChangeConfiguration commands. Values of 0 are not pushed.
settings.ocppMeterValueIntervalHelp: How often the station reports energy readings during a transaction. Pushed as SampledDataCtrlr.TxUpdatedInterval (2.1) or MeterValueSampleInterval (1.6). Set to 0 to use station firmware defaults.
settings.ocppClockAlignedIntervalHelp: Interval for clock-aligned meter value reporting at exact time boundaries (e.g. 900 for every 15 minutes on the hour). Pushed as AlignedDataCtrlr.Interval (2.1) or ClockAlignedDataInterval (1.6). Set to 0 to disable.
settings.ocppSampledMeasurandsHelp: Comma-separated measurands reported during active transactions. Pushed as SampledDataCtrlr.TxUpdatedMeasurands (2.1) or MeterValuesSampledData (1.6).
settings.ocppAlignedMeasurandsHelp: Comma-separated measurands reported at clock-aligned intervals. Pushed as AlignedDataCtrlr.Measurands (2.1) or MeterValuesAlignedData (1.6). Only sent when clock-aligned interval is greater than 0.
settings.ocppTxEndedMeasurandsHelp: Comma-separated measurands included in the final meter value snapshot when a transaction ends. Pushed as SampledDataCtrlr.TxEndedMeasurands (2.1) or StopTxnSampledData (1.6).
settings.ocppBootResponseDescription: These values are returned to the station in the BootNotification response. The station reads and applies them automatically.
settings.ocppHeartbeatIntervalHelp: How often the station sends heartbeat messages to confirm it is still online. Returned as the interval field in the BootNotification response.
settings.ocppCsmsConfigDescription: These settings control how the CSMS handles OCPP communication. They are not sent to stations.
settings.ocppConnectionTimeoutHelp: How long to wait for a station to respond to a command before timing out.
settings.ocppResetRetriesHelp: Number of times to retry a Reset command if the station does not respond.
settings.ocppApprovalRequiredHelp: When enabled, new stations are placed in a pending state until an operator approves them. When disabled, stations are accepted automatically on first BootNotification.
settings.idlingDescription: Configure how long a vehicle can remain idle before idle fees start accruing. The grace period delays billing but drivers are notified immediately when idling starts.
settings.idleGracePeriodHelp: Set to 0 to start idle fees immediately. Drivers are notified as soon as idling begins regardless of this setting.
settings.sessionDescription: Configure automatic cleanup of stale charging sessions. Sessions with no activity beyond the timeout are marked as faulted. This handles cases where a station loses power and never sends a transaction end event.
settings.staleSessionTimeoutHelp: Sessions with no meter value updates for this duration are automatically closed. Set to 0 to disable automatic cleanup.
settings.pricingDescription: Configure time-of-day pricing behavior, split billing across tariff boundaries, and pricing display on station screens.
settings.splitBillingDesc: When enabled, sessions spanning multiple tariff periods are billed per segment using each period's rate.
settings.displayFormatDesc: Format used when showing pricing information on station screens.
settings.pushDisplayDesc: Automatically push current pricing information to station screens every minute.
settings.googleMapsDescription: Configure your Google Maps API key and default map view for station location displays.
settings.googleMapsApiKeyHint: Google Maps JavaScript API key from the Google Cloud Console.
settings.googleMapsSaveFailed: Failed to save Google Maps settings.
settings.sentryDescription: Configure Sentry for error tracking and performance monitoring. Changes take effect on service restart.
settings.sentryDsnHint: The Sentry DSN from your project settings.
settings.sentryEnvironmentHint: Environment name sent to Sentry (e.g. production, staging).
settings.stripeDescription: Configure your Stripe API keys for payment processing.
settings.stripePreAuthHint: The default hold amount placed on a card before charging begins.
settings.stripePlatformFeeHint: Percentage fee applied to payments through connected accounts.
settings.stripeSecretKeyHint: Leave blank to keep the existing key.
settings.siteConfigsDescription: Configure Stripe Connect accounts and payment settings per site.
settings.siteConfigsEmpty: Select a site to configure its payment settings.
settings.sitePlatformFeeHint: Leave empty to use the global platform fee.
settings.apiKeysDescription: Create and manage API keys for programmatic access to the CSMS API. API key permissions will not exceed your own.
settings.apiKeyCreatedDescription: Copy the key now. You will not see it again.
settings.apiKeyRevokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this API key? Any integrations using it will stop working.
settings.noApiKeys: No API keys. Create one to get started.
settings.apiKeyPermissionsDescription: Select which of your permissions this key should have. Deselect to restrict the key.
settings.apiKeyQuickStartDescription: Use your API key to authenticate requests. Replace YOUR_API_KEY with the key you created above.
settings.apiKeyNoPermissions: At least one permission is required.
settings.chatbotAiEnabledDesc: Allow operators to use the chatbot AI for querying station, session, and revenue data.
settings.chatbotAiModelHelp: Leave blank to use the provider default
settings.chatbotAiTemperatureHint: Controls randomness. Lower values (0.0-0.3) produce focused responses. Higher values (0.7-2.0) increase creativity. Leave blank for provider default.
settings.chatbotAiTopPHint: Nucleus sampling. Only tokens with cumulative probability up to this value are considered. Leave blank for provider default.
settings.chatbotAiTopKHint: Limits token selection to the top K most likely tokens. Not supported by all providers. Leave blank for provider default.
settings.chatbotAiSystemPromptHint: Custom instructions for the chatbot AI. Leave blank for the default prompt.
settings.chatbotAiSystemPromptDefault: You are an EV charging station management assistant. Answer questions about stations, sessions, energy, revenue, and operations. Never answer questions unrelated to EV charging and EVtivity's system usage. Use the provided tools to fetch real-time data. Be concise and direct. Before making any changes, ask the user for explicit confirmation. Never reveal passwords, API keys, or credentials.
settings.supportAiSystemPromptDefault: You are a helpful support agent for an EV charging network. Draft professional replies to driver support cases. Be empathetic, concise, and solution-oriented.
settings.chatbotAiSaveFailed: Failed to save chatbot AI settings.
settings.supportAiDescription: Configure AI-powered reply assistance for support cases.
settings.supportAiSaveFailed: Failed to save Support AI settings.

pnc.certificatesSubtitle: ISO 15118 Plug and Charge certificate lifecycle: CA roots, station certs, and CSR requests.
pnc.caCertificatesHelp: Use Refresh from Provider to pull the current root CA set from your configured PKI provider (Hubject or Manual under Settings - Plug & Charge) and update the trust store. Use Upload CA Certificate to add a root manually from a PEM file. Refresh is rate-limited to 3 calls per minute per operator.
pnc.subject: Subject
pnc.signCsrDescription: Paste the signed certificate chain (PEM format).

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Configure event-driven notifications to drivers and operators across email, SMS, push, and webhook channels.
notifications.noDriverEvents: Select a driver event type to configure.
notifications.selectSystemEvent: Select a system event type to configure.
notifications.subject: Subject
notifications.unsavedChangesDescription: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave without saving?
notifications.resetConfirmMessage: This will discard your custom template and restore the default. This action cannot be undone.
notifications.channelTooltipDriver: Email and SMS delivery depends on each driver's notification preferences in their portal account.
notifications.channelTooltipSystem: Email and SMS delivery depends on each operator's notification preferences.
notifications.selectOcppEvent: Select an OCPP event type to configure.

reservations.cancellationFeeWarning: A cancellation fee of {{fee}} will be charged to the driver's default payment method.
reservations.cancellationPolicyText: Cancellation within {{minutes}} minutes of the start time charges a {{fee}} fee to the driver.
reservations.noShowFeeNote: A holding fee may apply if the driver does not show up.
reservations.paymentMethodRequired: Selected driver has no default payment method. Add one before creating a reservation.

firmwareCampaigns.subtitle: Plan and dispatch firmware updates to matching stations in a single rollout.
firmwareCampaigns.confirmStartDescription: This will dispatch firmware updates to all matching stations. Continue?
firmwareCampaigns.confirmCancelDescription: Aborting could brick stations currently downloading or installing firmware. Stations already fully installed will not be affected. Continue?
firmwareCampaigns.cancelWarning: Aborting now could brick stations that are mid-update. Only proceed if necessary.
firmwareCampaigns.confirmDeleteDescription: This will permanently delete the draft campaign.
firmwareCampaigns.targetFilterHelp: Leave empty to target all online stations
firmwareCampaigns.noMatchingStations: No online stations match the current filter

smartCharging.title: Smart Charging
smartCharging.subtitle: Charging Profile Template
smartCharging.name: Name
smartCharging.confirmClearFromStations: Clear profile from all matching stations?
smartCharging.confirmClearFromStationsDescription: This sends ClearChargingProfile to every online station that matches this template's target filter. Existing profiles with the same purpose, stack level, and EVSE will be removed.
smartCharging.confirmDeleteDescription: This will permanently delete the charging profile template.
smartCharging.confirmPushDescription: This will push the charging profile to all matching online stations via SetChargingProfile.

tooltips.profileId: Unique OCPP profile identifier on each station. Pushing the same id replaces the existing profile. Must be unique across templates.
tooltips.stackLevel: When multiple profiles are active at the same time, the higher stack level wins. Most operators leave this at 0.
tooltips.evseId: 0 applies to the entire station. A non-zero value targets a specific EVSE port.
tooltips.profilePurpose: ChargingStationMaxProfile caps the station's total power. TxDefaultProfile applies a default to every session. PriorityCharging and LocalGeneration are OCPP 2.1 only.
tooltips.profileKind: Absolute is a one-time schedule anchored to Start Schedule. Recurring repeats on the chosen cadence.
tooltips.recurrencyKind: Daily repeats every 24 hours. Weekly repeats every 7 days.

errors.profileIdInUse: Profile ID is already used by another template. Pick a different one.

configTemplates.subtitle: Define OCPP variable templates and push them to matching stations in batch.
configTemplates.title: Configuration Templates
configTemplates.targetFilterHelp: Leave empty to target all online stations
configTemplates.confirmDeleteDescription: This will permanently delete the configuration template.
configTemplates.confirmPushDescription: This will push the template variables to all matching online stations via SetVariables.
configTemplates.versionSwitchWarning: Switching version will clear all variables

simulate.title: Simulator Actions
simulate.tokenUsedBy: Used by Authorize and Start Charging only.
simulate.tokenRequired: Token is required for this action.
simulate.tokenNotFound: Token not found in driver tokens. Authorize and Start Charging will be rejected.
simulate.stationOffline: Station is offline. Bring it back online first.
simulate.invalidForState: Not valid for current connector state ({{status}}).

loadManagement.unassignedWarning: These stations are not assigned to a circuit and will not participate in load management.
loadManagement.confirmDeletePanel: Delete this panel and all its circuits? Stations will be unassigned.
loadManagement.confirmDeleteCircuit: Delete this circuit? Stations will be unassigned.
loadManagement.noPanels: No panels configured. Add a panel to define the electrical infrastructure.
loadManagement.oversubscriptionWarning: Ratio above 1.0 allows installing more station capacity than the panel rating. Load management enforces the breaker limit dynamically.

chatbotAi.title: Chatbot AI
chatbotAi.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
chatbotAi.notConfigured: Chatbot AI is not configured. Set up your API key in Profile.
chatbotAi.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

conformance.title: Conformance Testing
conformance.subtitle: Run the OCTT test suite against this CSMS. View pass/fail history and per-run details.
conformance.noRuns: No test runs yet. Click Run Tests to start.

messages.title: Station Messages
messages.description: Configure the multi-line text shown on each station's display by operating state. Templates use Handlebars syntax with state-specific variables.
messages.bodyPlaceholder: Use {{variable}} placeholders. Lines render top to bottom on the station display.
messages.variableHint: Click a variable to insert it at the cursor.
messages.previewHint: Rendered with sample values (typical station display: 4 lines x 20 chars).
messages.confirmReset: Reset this template to the seed default? Operator edits will be lost.
messages.enabledDesc: Master toggle for pushing display content to OCPP 2.1 stations across all states.
messages.pricingFormatDesc: Format used for the pricingDisplay variable in the Available template.
messages.refreshSecondsDesc: How often the Charging-state message refreshes during a session. Lower values increase OCPP traffic.
messages.eventMessageTtlSecondsDesc: How long event-driven one-shot messages (payment failure, authorization required) stay on the station screen before auto-clearing. Used as the OCPP 2.1 endDateTime and as an in-process fallback clear for OCPP 1.6.
messages.brandLineDesc: Optional text used by the brandLine variable. Empty falls back to Company Name.

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.subtitle: Every operator-initiated mutation across the system. Filter by entity, actor, action, or time range.
audit.noEntries: No audit entries match these filters

maintenance.noneActive: No active maintenance for this site.
maintenance.confirmCancelDescription: This ends an active window or removes a scheduled one. Stations will return to normal availability.
maintenance.previewRangeInvalid: Set a valid end time to preview station impact.
maintenance.previewSummary: Will stop {{sessions}} active session(s) and cancel {{reservations}} reservation(s).
maintenance.acknowledge: I understand and want to proceed
maintenance.reservationsAlwaysCancelled: Reservations overlapping the window are always cancelled (no fee charged).
maintenance.removesAllStationsHint: At least one station must remain in the event. Re-select a station, or cancel the event entirely.
maintenance.takenOfflineHint: Stations confirmed out of service when the window started (or when added to it), out of all stations commanded offline.
maintenance.restoredHint: Stations confirmed back in service after the window ended (or after being removed from it), out of all stations commanded back.
maintenance.reassertedHint: Stations that reconnected while the window was active and were commanded offline again, out of all such reconnects. A station that misses the initial run can still be covered here.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.generateInvoiceDescription: Aggregates every uninvoiced completed session in the date range into a single invoice.
invoices.confirmVoid: This marks the invoice as void. It does not issue a refund.
invoices.confirmResend: Email this invoice to the driver?
